log.errorPcOutOfBounds: Error: Program Counter out of bounds.
log.errorInvalidOpcode: Error: Invalid opcode {0} for current module at address {1}.
log.dCacheWrite: D-Cache WRITE on address {0} with value {1}

instructions.name: NOP
instructions.desc: No operation. Does nothing.

instructions.name: STA
instructions.desc: Stores the content of AC at memory address.

instructions.name: LDA
instructions.desc: Loads the value from the memory address into AC.

instructions.name: ADD
instructions.desc: Adds the value from the memory address to AC.

instructions.name: OR
instructions.desc: Performs a logical OR between AC and the content of the memory address.

instructions.name: AND
instructions.desc: Performs a logical AND between AC and the content of the memory address.

instructions.name: NOT
instructions.desc: Inverts all bits of AC.

instructions.name: JMP
instructions.desc: Jumps unconditionally to the memory address.

instructions.name: JN
instructions.desc: Jumps to the memory address if the sign flag (N) is set.

instructions.name: JZ
instructions.desc: Jumps to the memory address if the zero flag (Z) is set.

instructions.name: HLT
instructions.desc: Halts the program execution.

instructions.name: VLDA
instructions.desc: Loads a vector from memory (starting at address) into the VA register.

instructions.name: VSTA
instructions.desc: Stores the vector from VA into memory (starting at address).

instructions.name: VADD
instructions.desc: Adds, element by element, VA with the vector stored at memory address.

instructions.name: VEADD
instructions.desc: Adds the scalar value of AC to all elements of VA.

instructions.name: VOR
instructions.desc: Performs a logical OR, element by element, between VA and the vector from memory.

instructions.name: VAND
instructions.desc: Performs a logical AND, element by element, between VA and the vector from memory.

instructions.name: VNOT
instructions.desc: Inverts bit by bit each element of the VA vector.

instructions.name: LDIX
instructions.desc: Loads the value from memory into the Index Register (IX).

instructions.name: STIX
instructions.desc: Stores IX into memory.

instructions.name: LDBP
instructions.desc: Loads the value from memory into the Base Pointer (BP).

instructions.name: STBP
instructions.desc: Stores BP into memory.

instructions.name: LDX
instructions.desc: Loads into AC the memory value at address (end + IX).

instructions.name: STX
instructions.desc: Stores AC into memory at address (end + IX).

instructions.name: LDBX
instructions.desc: Loads into AC the memory value at address (BP + IX).

instructions.name: STBX
instructions.desc: Stores AC into memory at address (BP + IX).

instructions.name: LDB
instructions.desc: Loads the value from the memory address into B.

instructions.name: STB
instructions.desc: Stores the content of B at memory address.

instructions.name: LDI
instructions.desc: Loads an immediate value directly into AC.

instructions.name: LOOP
instructions.desc: Decrements IX. If IX != 0, jumps to the address.

instructions.name: VLDB
instructions.desc: Loads a vector from memory into the VB register.

instructions.name: VSTB
instructions.desc: Stores the vector from VB into memory.

instructions.name: VADDV
instructions.desc: Adds VA and VB element by element, storing in VA.

instructions.name: TAS
instructions.desc: Test-And-Set. If MEM == 0, MEM = 1 and Z = 1 (Acquired). Else, Z = 0.
